basic_details.job_title: Bihar Judicial Academy Patna Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Assistant Research Scholar, Senior Faculty Member Posts
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Research Scholar, Senior Faculty Member

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctorate (Ph.D.) in Law with NET/JRF OR LL.M. with consistently good academic record, Retired Judicial Officers from Superior Judicial Service with teaching experience
qualification.details: Assistant Research Scholar: Doctorate (Ph.D.) in Law with NET/JRF OR LL.M. with consistently good academic record. Minimum 02 years of teaching and/or research experience in a recognized institution. Senior Faculty Member: Retired Judicial Officers from Superior Judicial Service with teaching experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹27,700 – ₹44,700 plus D.A as per relevant rules (Assistant Research Scholar), ₹51,550 – ₹63,070 plus D.A as per relevant rules (Senior Faculty Member)
salary_details.details: Assistant Research Scholar: ₹27,700 – ₹44,700 plus D.A as per relevant rules Senior Faculty Member: ₹51,550 – ₹63,070 plus D.A as per relevant rules

selection_process: Shortlisting based on evaluation of research papers/publications/credentials/judgments Interaction/Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bihar Judicial Academy Patna Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://bja.bihar.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 19-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Bihar Judicial Academy Patna Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Bihar Judicial Academy Patna Recruitment 2026 is 19th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Research Scholar and Senior Faculty Member posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies. Out of these, 2 are for the Assistant Research Scholar post and 4 are for the Senior Faculty Member post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Research Scholar position?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Research Scholar position, candidates must have a Doctorate (Ph.D.) in Law with NET/JRF or an LL.M. with a consistently good academic record and at least 2 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. Who is eligible to apply for the Senior Faculty Member post?
faq.answer: Retired Judicial Officers from the Superior Judicial Service who possess teaching experience are eligible to apply for the Senior Faculty Member position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for these posts?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for Bihar Judicial Academy Patna Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Research Scholar post?
faq.answer: The selected Assistant Research Scholar will receive a salary in the range of ₹27,700 to ₹44,700 per month, plus Dearness Allowance as per applicable rules.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the Senior Faculty Member position?
faq.answer: The Senior Faculty Member will be paid a salary between ₹51,550 and ₹63,070 per month, along with Dearness Allowance as per the relevant rules.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these Bihar Judicial Academy Patna jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their research papers, publications, credentials, or judgments, followed by an interaction or interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Bihar Judicial Academy Patna, which is https://bja.bihar.gov.in.
